$meta.label: one45 legacy
$meta.note: The older 'one45' brand, LIVE on auth / password / self-send / React-shell pages (design_system_style = 'one45' | 'none'). No structured shade scale like Acuity; flat named brand colours plus an 8-step grey ramp. No radius / shadow / spacing / type-scale tokens are defined — type comes from new_branding.scss rules, not tokens.
$meta.font: Cabin (Google Fonts @import, new_branding.scss:1), letter-spacing 0.4px, h1 text-transform capitalize

type.note: no named type scale; sizes are per-rule in new_branding.scss

radius.$meta: [D] No radius token in the legacy SCSS — values are literal per-component declarations (Bootstrap-era). Recorded as a scale below; panels/inputs/alerts/badges declare none → Bootstrap default 4px (flagged).
radius.$sources: btn 3px new_branding.scss:211 · navbar-inner 4px _bootstrap.scss:224 · datepicker 3px _forms.scss:78 · modal 6px _bootstrap.scss:110 · modal-header 3px 3px 0 0 _bootstrap.scss:130

shadow.$meta: [D] No shadow token — literal box-shadow declarations only.
shadow.$gaps: dropdowns/popovers/panels declare none → Bootstrap defaults (dropdown 0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.175); popover 0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.2); panel 0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,.05)) — flagged

motion.$meta: [D] The legacy stack declares essentially NO motion — the only transition in the core SCSS is `.btn.stateful { transition: unset }` (new_branding.scss:227, a removal). Buttons/inputs/fade render at Bootstrap defaults (.fade .15s linear; .modal.fade transform .3s ease-out) — flagged. Recorded gap: no motion scale; the tool's :root structural scale applies.

zIndex.$meta: [D] No organized z-index stack in the legacy SCSS — ad-hoc values (5/10/500/1000/9999) + a custom #overlay scrim at 9999 (_bootstrap.scss:37). Only real DS-layer override: .popover 1000 !important (_bootstrap.scss:153). Dropdown/modal/backdrop/tooltip render at Bootstrap defaults (1000/1050/1040/1070) — flagged. Recorded gap; the tool's :root structural stack applies.

opacity.$meta: [D] No opacity scale. Opacity used only for disabled/muted states (.suspended .5 _body.scss:92; disabled icons .3 _actions.scss:131) and the scrim: #overlay is a solid #cccccc element at opacity .5 (_overlay.scss:3-4) — a real opacity-based backdrop. The tool renders the scrim as an rgba colour per the no-opacity rule (flagged [I], see feedback.modal.scrimNote) and exposes only --ds-opacity-disabled (0.5).

breakpoints.$meta: [D] Bootstrap 2 (v2.0.2, web/vendor/twitterbootstrap2/). The legacy skin authors exactly ONE breakpoint — min/max-width 768px, the adaptive-nav show/collapse (themes/one45-responsive.scss:28,41); the BS2 default tiers (480/767/979/980/1200) are inherited, never overridden. A real desktop page floor min-width 1100px on .page-body.row-fluid (one45-responsive.scss:6) makes legacy a fixed-DESKTOP layout, not a mobile-responsive one. Recorded gap (no responsive scale authored beyond the 768 nav toggle); the tool's structural reference scale applies, md 768 coinciding with the real legacy value. See reconciliation §4h.

grid.$meta: [D] Bootstrap 2 grid, INHERITED not authored: 12 columns (.span1-.span12), 20px gutter, 60px column unit, 940px base / 1170px large container (bootstrap.css:149-150,170,203; bootstrap-responsive.css:524). The legacy SCSS defines NO $grid-columns / $grid-gutter-width / $container-* override (recorded gap). Real legacy-authored layout constants are component sizes, not a grid scale: $sidebar_width 250px (_constants.scss:40), nav .span3 220px (one45-responsive.scss:16), $pageheaderheight 40px (_constants.scss:48), page floor 1100px. The tool carries the BS2 20px gutter as the legacy --ds-grid-gutter (flagged framework default); columns/container stay structural. See reconciliation §4h.

formControls.$meta: [D] from the legacy CSS skin (PageBundle/.../css/src/). Legacy has NO React form-control library — Bootstrap/Twig markup re-skinned by SCSS. Two-speed: text inputs kept the old grey one45 look; buttons converged to the Acuity DS.

input.note: NO radius/padding/:focus declared (Bootstrap default falls through). border #DDD fails 3:1 UI (1.36). select height 32px (_bootstrap.scss:14-18).

checkboxRadio.note: no element styling — browser default; only label colour set

button.$source: new_branding.scss:206-318, _actions.scss:233-330 — re-skinned to the Acuity DS

navigation.$meta: [D] from the legacy CSS skin. Tabs are Bootstrap nav-tabs — BOX folder tabs, a real structural divergence from Acuity's underline tabs (rendered per-system, not token-swapped). The legacy app has a bespoke chevron .breadcrumb-widget the Acuity DS never built (legacy-only piece → bridge fills acuity). NO pagination skin and NO stepper/wizard CSS exist (steps render via webeval tags only) — recorded gaps; pagination is NOT enshrined in either system.

tabs.note: active tab is a box (border #AAAAAA top+sides, bottom merges with strip), NOT an underline; older Bootstrap tabs used active link #0088CC, current React-page override is purple/black. strip/box rule #AAAAAA fails 3:1 UI (2.32) — flagged.

link.note: legacy body link is #888; .ltsk (learning-task) link is $primary_purple #42507D bold (new_branding.scss:27-37)

breadcrumb.note: real legacy widget is a CSS-triangle chevron trail on the dark page-header (segment colours #B0B1D7 / #666 / #cccccc); the tool flattens it to a '/'-separated trail — geometry simplification flagged.

navigation.$gaps: pagination + stepper/wizard exist in NEITHER system as a styled component — not enshrined; to be sourced from a real list/wizard page later before any enshrining.

feedback.$meta: [D] from the legacy CSS skin + Twig partials. Legacy has NO React feedback component library — it is a CSS skin (.one45-alert, .modal) over Twig includes (WidgetBundle Error/* partials, 154 uses) + react-bootstrap Modal in 4 island bundles + the webeval `busy` tag. The Feedback & status slice enshrines Modal first.

modal.scrimNote: [I] Bootstrap-2 default — the SCSS declares the backdrop via opacity, not a colour; the tool uses a solid rgba per the no-opacity rule

header.note: the GREY BAND — the ONLY divergence from one45 (2020s)'s headerless modal, captured as pure tokens (no structural override)

modal.note: react-bootstrap dialog; one canonical Modal API absorbs both this AND the one45 (2020s) Dialog — the API-survival test PASSED.

alert.$status: REAL legacy alert — NATIVE in the tool (corrected from the earlier one45-2020s-only model)
alert.note: radius 0, padding 16px, solid pale fills (info is a solid $primary_purple fill, white text). The Error/* partials (error/warning/info/success/sorry/errors) are the de-facto canonical legacy alert. Now enshrined native-both — all four variants pass AA (contrast.mjs); see reconciliation §4e.

spinner.value: animated cog GIF (busy2.gif), no CSS skin
spinner.note: legacy 'spinner' is an image, not a styled component — recorded gap for a CSS spinner.

feedback.gaps: status badge/chip, tag/chip, empty-state, toast — NO legacy skin in any source (CSS / Twig / webeval / react-bootstrap). .progress has only a line-height (no fill). Tag/chip + empty-state + toast are gaps in BOTH systems -> not enshrined.

iconography.$meta: [D] legacy has THREE overlapping icon mechanisms, not one. The glyph ARTWORK is a recorded asset gap (a paid FA Pro webfont + binary PNG sprites, not shipped by the tool); the tool sizes a token-driven stand-in at the real sourced sizes (src/styles/tokens.css --ds-icon-* = 0.9rem / 1.5rem / 25px). No webeval icon tag exists (tag_tutorials has none — icons are inline <i> in the PHP outputters).

famfamfam.colour: baked into the PNG (CSS sets no colour)

iconography.colour: explicit SCSS palette vars per context (no currentColor). Alert icons: teal $primary_teal_dark #2FAEA1 / yellow $primary_yellow #F8B223 / red $primary_red #F12F62 / info $primary_purple_light #B3B9CB (new_branding.scss:100,119,140,159).

tones.$note: the alert-icon palette as the glyph on white, judged 3:1 UI (contrast.mjs 'icon tones'); 3 of 4 fail at icon scale -> pair with shape/label, never hue alone

iconography.glyphicons: NOT used (one stray animation class only — settings.html.twig:55)
iconography.note: reconciliation map §4g. One canonical Icon/IconButton API + a two-step size token scale absorb both this FA/sprite stack and the one45 (2020s) named-vocabulary component.

dataDisplay.$meta: [D] the real legacy table skin (_tables.scss + _constants.scss). Legacy authors a custom table skin keyed on table.report/.standard/.bordered (NOT the Bootstrap .table* classes, which it inherits unchanged from vendored BS2). Sort is DataTables (PNG up/down arrows under .dataTables_wrapper). NOTE: this skin is NOT live on the modern Acuity-rebranded staging ([R]: the legacy table classes render inert there) — it is the documented legacy-pole reality, sourced from SCSS. Reconciliation map §4i.

table.sortArrows: DataTables PNG sort_up.png/sort_down.png (custom_icons/) — the tool simplifies to a token-coloured text caret
table.contrast: text #444/white 9.74 (AAA); header rule #999/white 2.85 (FAILS 3:1 — add to legacy fix list, same class as the #DDD input + #AAA tab greys); cell border #BBB/white 1.92 (fails, thin decorative). contrast.mjs 'legacy Table'.
table.instances: table.standard (records.html.twig importer/eDossier), report-tabular DataTables grids (_base_tabular_report.html.twig, grades_marks.html.twig 'marksheet'), rotation listing

card.$meta: [D] legacy ships NO bespoke card component. Real card surfaces are (a) vendored Bootstrap panel/modal and (b) the real .dashboard-widget tile (themes/one45.scss:657-715: li 1px #CCC border, grey h3 title band #CCC, content #000 16px); a real React island uses react-bootstrap Card (canvas_sync/.../syncJob.jsx). So legacy 'has' a card via a DIFFERENT MECHANISM (the mirror of shipping a real Alert but no Badge). [R] bespoke-card not separately captured (cards render via vendored Bootstrap, not a first-party component) — values modelled on the legacy panel idiom, a recorded gap. Reconciliation map §4j.
card.render: the legacy panel/modal grey-band idiom (already enshrined for the legacy Modal, _bootstrap.scss): white body with a #F5F5F5 grey header band + #EEE bottom rule, $grey #D1D1D9 border, 4px base radius, $one45_black #27304B title at 16px (the .dashboard-widget h3 size). The grey band is full-bleed (the one per-system structural flourish, like the legacy box tabs).
card.contrast: title #27304B on band #F5F5F5 11.96 (AAA) and on white body 13.04 (AAA); border $grey #D1D1D9/white 1.52 (fails 3:1 — thin decorative border, flagged, the real $grey). contrast.mjs 'legacy Card'.

avatar.$meta: [D] legacy owns the only real person-photo widgets (the Acuity DS ships none), so Avatar is legacy-native, a present-vs-absent (axis b) piece — the Breadcrumb mirror. TWO real shapes enshrined as one canonical Avatar (a shape variant). The handoff's `.badge-details` lead was WRONG — that is a name-dropdown text panel (no , themes/one45.scss:483-499), not a photo widget. No initials fallback in either shape (placeholder IMAGES: blank.gif/add_photo.gif/person_outline.gif). Reconciliation map §4k.
avatar.circle: $source _list_picker.scss:26-31,41-54 — the inline people-picker/self-send .profile-img: circular, 25px (sm) / 60px (lg), border 2px (`2px solid` = currentColor, no authored colour [I]), blank.gif placeholder
avatar.card: $source photoGallery.css:8-60, photo.php:14-62 — the webeval yearbook tile .photo: a 75px-wide #FFF card, 1px #BBB border, 3px pad, square corners, holding a 75x98 image with a name caption beneath in #666 at 9px
avatar.contrast: card caption #666/white 5.74 (AA text); card border #BBB/white 1.92 (fails 3:1 — thin decorative border, flagged). The circle ring is currentColor (no fixed pair). contrast.mjs 'legacy Avatar'.

list.$meta: [D] the real .list-widget (themes/one45.scss:457-467) — an unstyled <ul>, list-style none, margin/padding 0, each <li> padded-left 25px ($inline_list_spacing_unit, _constants.scss:15); used for page-header/footer nav lists with link items. The page-footer variant adds a folder.png bullet (one45.scss:648-651). .records_list is table styling (the Table slice, NOT a list); canned_list (.ul_canned, uls.css) is a search/picker UI, not a data-display list. So legacy HAS a real general list (.list-widget) — native, the markerless `plain` canonical default. [R] not separately captured (list-widgets render in nav chrome, not a DS gallery). Reconciliation map §4l.
list.render: token-driven <ul>/<ol>: item text $one45_black #27304B; marker #27304B; item links $link_color #0A6CBD (_colors.scss:34); indent 25px ($inline_list_spacing_unit); tight rows (line-height ~20px). The legacy default is markerless = the canonical `plain` variant; bulleted/numbered add a standard marker. One canonical API, pure token swap.
list.contrast: item text #27304B/white 13.04 (AAA); item link #0A6CBD/white 5.39 (AA text); marker #27304B/white 13.04 (UI pass). contrast.mjs 'legacy List'.

accordion.$meta: [D] the real .subheader-sticky.collapsible pattern (webeval collapsibleHeaders.js + collapsibleHeaders.css; example admin/pages/classes/curricGroups.php). A sticky <h2> header with a 2px #27304B underline (border-bottom, NOT a card border), a navy #27304B bold 1.2rem label, white background, and a right-floated chevron (i.angle.right.icon) that rotates 90deg open; the .section-content body is hidden by a .closed modifier and sections sit 15px apart (.closed margin-bottom). A second, simpler disclosure (collapsible_section tag — [+] show / [-] hide links) also exists; the .collapsible accordion is the enshrined general pattern. So Accordion is native here. This is the structural divergence (the Tabs precedent): legacy is an UNDERLINE-header accordion, not a card. Reconciliation map §4m.
api: single(default true; single=false = independent panels = the native collapsibleHeaders model)
accordion.render: underline-header model (app.css structural override): no card border/radius/header-fill; header label $one45_black #27304B bold 1.2rem over a 2px #27304B border-bottom; chevron #27304B rotates 90deg open; hover swaps label/rule to #787C88; header pad 16px/0/5px; sections 15px apart (.closed margin). [R] not separately captured (renders in curriculum admin chrome, not a DS gallery).
accordion.contrast: header label $one45_black #27304B/white 13.04 (AAA); hover #787C88/white 4.17 (fails AA as normal text, but the header is 1.2rem BOLD = large text, 3:1 -> passes); underline rule #27304B/white 13.04 (UI pass). contrast.mjs 'one45 legacy Accordion'.

tree.$meta: [D] the real jQuery dynatree widget, skinned by the authored _dynatree.scss (WidgetBundle: .dynatree-container border:none + margin-left:0; .dynatree-selected a colour acuity-blue #364699, font-style normal) over the vendored vista skin (16px node rows, expand triangle, folder/doc sprite). Node label is $one45_black #27304B; the one authored colour is the acuity-blue selected node. So Tree is native here — a classic file-tree widget. The Acuity DS package ships no Tree, so acuity-canon bridges a flagged interim. Reconciliation map §4n.
tree.render: underline/indent model: token-driven indented rows + a rotating disclosure chevron (the common denominator vs the vendored dynatree node rows); node label $one45_black #27304B; selected/active node acuity-blue #364699 (.dynatree-selected a); 16px per-level indent (dynatree node indent); tight rows. The dynatree connector lines + folder/doc sprite are a recorded simplification (icon asset gap).
tree.contrast: node label $one45_black #27304B/white 13.04 (AAA); selected node #364699/white 8.42 (AAA, 3:1 UI). contrast.mjs 'one45 legacy Tree'.

timeline.$meta: [D] legacy/webeval ships NO history or timeline component (zero matches across webeval CSS / Twig / PHP for a status-history, activity-feed, or timeline). So Timeline is one45-2020s-ONLY (the modern app's EPA status-history, _history.scss); in legacy it resolves through the BRIDGE to a flagged interim (INTERIM_BUILDS). The inverse of Avatar (legacy-native, one45-2020s-bridged). Reconciliation map §4o.
timeline.render: NOT a status-quo legacy component — the --ds-timeline-* legacy values style ONLY the flagged bridge interim so it reads on-brand: $primary_purple #42507D marker, $one45_black #27304B title, $grey #D1D1D9 rail, #5F5F5F date.
timeline.contrast: interim title #27304B/white 13.04 (AAA); marker $primary_purple #42507D/white 7.85 (AAA, 3:1 UI). contrast.mjs 'one45 legacy Timeline'.

dataDisplay.gaps: No CSS `marksheet` class exists (the colloquial marksheet renders via the generic report-tabular/DataTables skin). No position:sticky header (beyond the .subheader-sticky accordion header). Legacy ships no bespoke card (§4j — modelled on the panel idiom). Avatar IS native (the .profile-img circle + the .photo yearbook card, §4k). List IS native (the real .list-widget, §4l). Accordion IS native (the real .subheader-sticky.collapsible, §4m). Tree IS native (the jQuery dynatree widget, §4n). Timeline is ABSENT (one45-2020s-only) — bridge-filled here (§4o). Stat/code-block/key-value = FOLLOW-UP slice. Tag/chip/empty-state/toast remain both-systems gaps.
